LanguageData.TabRegisterOpenedTooltip: When checked, patrons can browse the bazaar while a sales shift is active.
LanguageData.AlertNoRegisterExplanation: To open your bazaar, you need at least one register. This can be built from the production tab.
LanguageData.AlertNoCashierExplanation: To operate your bazaar, you need at least one active shift at a register and an assigned clerk.
LanguageData.Storefront_Sell.reportString: selling TargetB to TargetA at the bazaar.
